creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
devel/silc-toolkit has a new release which fixes some format string
bugs, and other non-security related things. The details on the security
fixes are sparse.

http://silcnet.org/docs/changelog/SILC%20Toolkit%201.1.10

I've attached a patch to update the port to the latest release. I've
CC'ed the maintainer also.

How-To-Repeat: N/A
